# Course Overview {.unnumbered}

This site contains the course materials for Introduction to Data Science.

## Start Here

- Read the [Software Setup](setup.qmd) page before the first class.
- Use the sidebar to navigate through the practice sessions in order.
- Open notebooks directly from the relevant chapter page.

## Course Structure

The practice sessions are organized by subject, while the `TA` label in each chapter title keeps the teaching order visible.

## Notes

- The site is intended to be followed in sequence.
- If you are looking for installation instructions, start with the setup page.
